name: Speed-to-Lead
description: Qualify inbound intake-form submissions via SMS within minutes and book the next available consultation.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{contact.firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — thanks for reaching out about a new-patient consultation! No pressure at all, just a couple quick questions so we can get you in: any preferred day/time that works for you? And do you have dental insurance you'd like us to check?
steps.exit_when: The prospect has shared a preferred day/time for a new-patient consultation AND confirmed their insurance status (yes / no / unsure).

extract.preferred_start: ISO-8601 datetime for the preferred appointment start, snapped to the next available slot in the clinic's business hours (Mon–Fri 9am–5pm local time).
extract.insurance_status: one of: yes | no | unsure | not_asked

args.notes: Booked by Speed-to-Lead agent. Insurance status: {{insurance_status}}.

args.subject: You're booked with Bright Smile Dental 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{contact.firstName}},

You're all set for {{preferred_start}} — we're so glad you reached out. Here's what to expect: a relaxed 45-minute visit with our team, a gentle look at how your smile is doing, and plenty of time for any questions. No sales pressure, ever.

We've got your insurance status noted as {{insurance_status}} — we'll take care of the rest on our end.

Need to reschedule or have a question before you come in? Just reply to this email or text us back — a real human will get right back to you.

See you soon,
The Bright Smile Dental team
